---
title: "Afrose_review"
author: "Shamima Afrose"
date: "2026-03-23"
output: html_document

# Overall review
A strong understanding of data processing and visualization, with a well-structured workflow, is evident. 

# Data acquisition
Using relative file paths is a good choice and improves portability. 

# Data inspection
This part was straightforward and enough to pre-assess the data. However, the inspected data info, like rows/variables/size, could be mentioned in the comment. Obviously, it's not mandatory. 

# Data processing 
The way workflow has been generated is understandable, reproducible, and easy to explain. However, for the filtering step using filter(Group == c(...)), %in% could be used to select multiple groups properly.

# Data Visualization
The way a detailed view of Homozygous, Heterozygous, and Missing data per chromosome, side-by-side for Maize and Teosinte, has been plotted is praiseworthy.

# End of review
